purpose: Implementation packet built from existing original-source analysis artifacts. This packet reduces repeated source reading; it is not completion evidence by itself.
trustRules: packet rows must preserve sourcePath and sourceLine/label references where available
mapped/classified rows are implementation inputs, not implementation proof
workers may propose patches from packets, but main Codex must review and integrate
runtime tests/traces are still required to claim implementation parity

sourceSnippets.label: RUNNING_COST
sourceSnippets.text:
162: @RUNNING_COST
  163: ;基礎維持運営費
  164: A = 500
  165: 
  166: ;日付が30日を超えると$1000追加
  167: SIF DAY > 31
  168: 	A += 1000
  169: ;日付が50日を超えると$2000追加
  170: SIF DAY > 51
  171: 	A += 2000
  172: 
  173: ;個室を拡張していると$500追加
  174: SIF FLAG:48 & 1
  175: 	A += 500
  176: ;SMグッズを購入していると$100追加
  177: SIF FLAG:48 & 2
  178: 	A += 100
  179: ;護衛を雇用していると$1000追加
  180: SIF FLAG:48 & 4
  181: 	A += 1000
  182: ;浴室を拡張していると$500追加
  183: SIF FLAG:48 & 32
  184: 	A += 500
  185: ;多目的ホールを建てていると$1800追加
  186: SIF FLAG:48 & 8
  187: 	A += 1800
  188: ;マイクを購入していると$100追加
  189: SIF FLAG:48 & 16
  190: 	A += 100
  191: ;警備員を雇用していると人数*$500追加
  192: SIF FLAG:48 & 64
  193: 	A += FLAG:40 * 500
  194: 
  195: ;娼館人気が50以上で1割増, 70以上で2割増, 90以上で3割増
  196: IF EXP:MASTER:91 >= 50
  197: 	TIMES A , 1.10
  198: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:91 >= 70
  199: 	TIMES A , 1.20
  200: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:91 >= 90
  201: 	TIMES A , 1.30
  202: ENDIF
  203: 
  204: ;공헌도が100以上で1割減, 200以上で2割減, 400以上で3割減, 700以上で4割減……
  205: IF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 3000
  206: 	TIMES A , 0.10
  207: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 2000
  208: 	TIMES A , 0.30
  209: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 1200
  210: 	TIMES A , 0.50
  211: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 700
  212: 	TIMES A , 0.60
  213: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 400
  214: 	TIMES A , 0.70
  215: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 200
  216: 	TIMES A , 0.80
  217: ELSEIF EXP:MASTER:90 >= 100
  218: 	TIMES A , 0.90
  219: ENDIF
  220: 
  221: ;基礎生活費(生活費機能実装までの暫定的な処理)
  222: ;1人あたりEASY/NORMAL/EXTRAは$100, HARDは$200, LUNATICは$300, PHANTASMは$400
  223: IF FLAG:5 <= 2 || FLAG:5 == 9
  224: 	A += CHARANUM*100
  225: ELSEIF FLAG:5 == 3
  226: 	A += CHARANUM*200
  227: ELSEIF FLAG:5 == 4
  228: 	A += CHARANUM*300
  229: ELSEIF FLAG:5 == 5
  230: 	A += CHARANUM*400
  231: ENDIF
  232: ;MASTERの分は無料or割引
  233: A -= 100
  234: 
  235: ;難易度EASYで0.8倍, HARDで1.2~2.5倍, POWERFULで1.4~5.0倍, PHANTASMで2.0~16.0倍
  236: IF FLAG:5 == 1
  237: 	TIMES A , 0.80
  238: ELSEIF FLAG:5 == 3
  239: 	IF DAY <= 20
  240: 		TIMES A , 1.20
  241: 	ELSEIF DAY <= 40
  242: 		TIMES A , 1.50
  243: 	ELSEIF DAY <= 60
  244: 		TIMES A , 2.00
  245: 	ELSE
  246: 		TIMES A , 2.50
  247: 	ENDIF
  248: ELSEIF FLAG:5 == 4
  249: 	IF DAY <= 20
  250: 		TIMES A , 1.40
  251: 	ELSEIF DAY <= 30
  252: 		TIMES A , 1.80
  253: 	ELSEIF DAY <= 40
  254: 		TIMES A , 3.00
  255: 	ELSE
  256: 		TIMES A , 5.00
  257: 	ENDIF
  258: ELSEIF FLAG:5 == 5
  259: 	IF DAY <= 15
  260: 		TIMES A , 2.00
  261: 	ELSEIF DAY <= 25
  262: 		TIMES A , 4.00
  263: 	ELSEIF DAY <= 35
  264: 		TIMES A , 8.00
  265: 	ELSE
  266: 		TIMES A , 16.00
  267: 	ENDIF
  268: ENDIF
  269: 
  270: ;EASYは21日目から, NORMAL以上は11日目から維持費＆生活費が発生する
  271: IF FLAG:5 != 9
  272: 	IF (FLAG:5 == 1 && DAY >= 20) || (FLAG:5 >= 2 && DAY >= 10)
  273: 		PRINTFORML 사무소 유지비로 {A}포인트 들었다……
  274: 		DRAWLINE
  275: 		MONEY -= A
  276: 	ENDIF
  277: ENDIF

implementationWorkOrder.recommendedWorkerInput: Use only this packet scope to propose bounded web code/test patches. Do not expand the source scope unless main asks. Do not infer completion from packet inclusion.

implementedEffects.effectId: source effect id from this packet only
implementedEffects.test: test or smoke evidence to add/run, or empty if not yet testable
implementedEffects.notes: short reason the effect is covered

remainingEffects.effectId: source effect id from this packet only
remainingEffects.reason: why not implemented in this patch proposal

requiredPatchReviewQuestions: Which original labels/effects does the patch implement?
Which web feature/domain files are changed?
Which source effects remain unimplemented or require transfer/exclusion?

highRiskRows.reason: Source-effect rows are not implementation evidence, but unclassified/blocked rows identify work that cannot be silently ignored.

implementationWorkOrder.packetAccountingRule: Every sourceEffects.rows effectId must appear exactly once in implementedEffects, remainingEffects, transferredEffects, or excludedEffects in worker output.
